user_story: As a Manager, I want to view detailed appreciation records including category, feedback, and points, so that I can see how employees are being recognized
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciation Details screen; When records exist; Then I can see employee name, appreciated by, appreciation category, feedback, points received, and date

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter appreciations by active or inactive status and by period, so that I can review current or historical recognition
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciation Details screen; When I choose Active or Inactive appreciations and a From and To period; Then only matching appreciations are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter appreciation details by department and employee name, so that I can focus on a specific team or person
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciation Details screen; When I select a department and an employee name; Then only their appreciations are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the appreciation details, so that I can refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
